organization.name: Austin Becker E-Commerce Marketing
organization.description: U.S.-based PPC agency helping $5M–$50M annual revenue e-commerce stores grow through paid advertising on Google, Amazon, and Microsoft, with specialization in product data feed optimization for large Shopify catalogs.

services.name: Google Shopping Ads
services.description: Product listing ads with emphasis on product data optimization, inventory prioritization, and e-commerce reporting.

services.name: Google Search Ads
services.description: Text search ads across the Google ad inventory to drive incremental e-commerce sales.

services.name: Google Display Network
services.description: Display advertising to keep stores top-of-mind through the purchase decision.

services.name: Amazon Ads
services.description: Amazon advertising optimized around ad spend efficiency and ACOS targets aligned to business goals.

services.name: Product Feeds
services.description: Product data feed creation and optimization so listings stand out across channels.

services.name: Microsoft Ads
services.description: Paid advertising on Bing, AOL, Yahoo, and DuckDuckGo via Microsoft Advertising.

services.name: YouTube Ads
services.description: YouTube video ad campaigns to drive consideration and purchase.
